external_gif.load_failed: The external GIF could not be loaded.
external_gif.offline: This external GIF may be unavailable while offline.
external_gif.privacy_notice: Load this GIF from {provider}. The provider will receive this browser’s network request.

external_gifs.title: External GIFs
external_gifs.description: External GIFs stay on the provider’s servers. Loading one contacts that provider directly from this browser.

auto_load.label: Load external GIFs automatically
auto_load.description: Load supported GIFs when they approach the visible timeline. Reduced-motion preferences still require a click.
